items.title: Want to live forever? Meta patented an AI model that would keep your profile active after you die
items.description: Meta’s new AI patent means your dead uncle could still comment fire emojis on your posts, but experts say this could undermine grief and closure.

items.description: Starting in North Carolina on Tuesday, older House Democrats face a test of their staying power and the appetite of voters to replace them.
